content.text: Create a 15-second photorealistic cinematic wildlife documentary video for a USA Facebook Reels audience in vertical 9:16 format. Use the approved master image as identity reference. Subject: a bald eagle with full-body readable anatomy standing on a wet riverside branch in morning light. Preserve the same eagle identity, white head, yellow beak, dark brown body, realistic wings, talons, habitat, and light direction. SHOT 1, 0:00-0:03 hook: low telephoto vertical frame as the eagle turns its head once toward camera. SHOT 2, 0:03-0:07 build: the eagle spreads its wings once while gripping the branch. SHOT 3, 0:07-0:11 peak motion: the eagle lifts into a short grounded takeoff motion with realistic wing mechanics and water mist behind it. SHOT 4, 0:11-0:15 payoff: the eagle settles into a clean loop-ready glide above the river. no blood, no gore, no visible wounds/injury, no generated text, no watermark, no humans.

notes: Dry-run example only. Paid submission remains blocked until docs/official-rest-sample.redacted.json is created from a redacted official Playground REST sample.
